# Master IR Library: Naim-Topping-B&O Hybrid

### ⚠️ Port Mapping Requirements
*   **Ports 1 & 2 (38kHz):** Standard IR emitters for Topping D90/A90.
*   **Port 3 (455kHz):** High-Frequency Blaster for Beomaster 8000. **Must be set to "IR Blaster" in iTach settings.**

---

### 1. Topping A90 Discrete (38kHz - Port 1:2)


| Command | Global Caché IR String |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Volume Up** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |
| **Volume Down** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |
| **Input: XLR** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |
| **Input: RCA** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |
| **Gain Toggle** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |
| **Output Toggle** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |

---

### 2. Topping D90 DAC (38kHz - Port 1:2)


| Command | Global Caché IR String |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Input: AES** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |
| **Input: Optical** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |

---

### 3. Beolab Terminal / Beomaster 8000 (455kHz - Port 1:3)


| Command | Global Caché IR String |
| :--- | :--- |
| **PH (Vinyl)** | `sendir,1:3,1,455000,1,1,15,15,31,47,15,15,15,15,15,15,15,47,15,15,15,3500` |
| **TP1 (Tape)** | `sendir,1:3,1,455000,1,1,15,15,31,47,15,15,15,15,15,15,15,15,15,47,15,3500` |
| **RADIO (FM)** | `sendir,1:3,1,455000,1,1,15,15,31,47,15,15,15,15,15,31,15,15,15,47,15,3500` |
| **FILTER** | `sendir,1:3,1,455000,1,1,15,15,31,47,15,15,15,15,15,15,15,15,15,15,31,3500` |
| **ARROW RIGHT** | `sendir,1:3,1,455000,1,1,15,15,31,47,15,15,15,15,31,31,15,15,15,15,15,3500` |
| **ARROW LEFT** | `sendir,1:3,1,455000,1,1,15,15,31,47,15,15,15,15,15,31,31,15,15,15,15,15,3500` |
| **VOLUME UP** | `sendir,1:3,1,455000,1,1,15,15,31,47,15,15,15,15,31,15,15,15,15,15,15,3500` |
| **VOLUME DOWN** | `sendir,1:3,1,455000,1,1,15,15,31,47,15,15,15,15,15,15,31,15,15,15,15,3500` |
